category_sources: Official homepage at https://www.fetchmail.info/ describes fetchmail as a remote-mail retrieval and forwarding utility.
source_facts.description says it fetches mail from POP, IMAP, ETRN, and ODMR servers.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and FAQ at https://www.fetchmail.info/ use the project name fetchmail.
docs_sources: Official FAQ at https://www.fetchmail.info/fetchmail-FAQ.html says the latest FAQ is available alongside sources on the fetchmail home page.
Official manual page at https://www.fetchmail.info/fetchmail-man.html is the primary command documentation.
repo_sources: Official FAQ at https://www.fetchmail.info/fetchmail-FAQ.html lists https://gitlab.com/fetchmail/fetchmail and SourceForge Git repositories.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official FAQ source section.
tags_sources: Official homepage at https://www.fetchmail.info/ describes fetchmail as retrieving mail and forwarding via SMTP.
source_facts.description lists POP, IMAP, ETRN, and ODMR mail retrieval.
